text: Just as you chose to lay in wait for your Ex boss to return before taking him down, you hear someone hefty muttering to himself from the main room “did I leave the door open?” You know the time to strike is now so you bust out of the office. Locking onto your boss like a blood hound you pounce, with the element of surprise on your hand quickly subdue him. You leave him with all the incriminating evidence on the doorstep of village guards. You walk off into the sunset. Congratulations You Have Found The Vigilante Ending [New Game]
